title: bash completion: remove shebang
body:
Remove the bash completion's shebang, which isn't required as the file
is only meant to be sourced.  rpmlint was complaining about that.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body:
LGTM, assuming happy tests.

@vrothberg I'm curious, where were you seeing the error?  In a open suse compilation?

> @vrothberg I'm curious, where were you seeing the error? In a open suse compilation?

@TomSweeneyRedHat, that's correct. We are building all packages in an OBS instance (see podman https://build.opensuse.org/package/show/devel:CaaSP:Head:ControllerNode/podman), which is using `rpmlint` to perform some additional checks. In case of podman, you can find the log here: https://build.opensuse.org/package/binary/download/devel:CaaSP:Head:ControllerNode/podman/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/x86_64/rpmlint.log

:pushpin: Commit c993b0f has been approved by `rhatdan`
